name: Gemini 3.5 Flash-Lite
archDisplay: Sparse Mixture-of-Experts Transformer (configuration undisclosed); reasoning-capable multimodal Lite model in the Gemini 3.5 series

price.provider: Google AI Studio / Vertex AI (Gemini API)

note: Google DeepMind's fastest and least-expensive model in the Gemini 3.5 family, released 2026-07-21 alongside Gemini 3.6 Flash. A low-latency, high-throughput reasoning model (thinking supported despite the Lite tier) built as a 'subagent' for high-volume automation -- agentic search, document processing, classification and routing. 1M-token context, natively multimodal (text/image/audio/video in, text out), ~350 output tokens/sec (official). Model ID gemini-3.5-flash-lite, generally available on the Gemini API/AI Studio/Vertex; $0.30/M input, $2.50/M output (cache-hit input ~$0.03/M). Benchmarks are Google self-reported from the joint launch blog, which shows large jumps over the prior Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite (e.g. GDPval-AA v2 1140 vs 642, Terminal-Bench 2.1 54% vs 31%). No independent per-benchmark scores exist yet (Artificial Analysis publishes only a composite Intelligence Index of 36).

results.notes: SWE-Bench Pro (Public Dataset), official joint launch blog (54.2% vs 49.6% for Gemini 3 Flash). Corroborated by 9to5Google.
Terminal-Bench 2.1, official launch blog (54% vs 31% for Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite). Corroborated by 9to5Google.
GDPval-AA v2 (Elo, 0-2000 scale), official launch blog (1140 vs 642 for Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite). Corroborated by 9to5Google.
OSWorld-Verified, computer use, official launch blog (74.0% vs 65.1% for Gemini 3 Flash). Corroborated by 9to5Google.

verificationNotes: ROUND (2026-07-22): New model from Google's July-21-2026 Flash wave (see gemini-3-6-flash verificationNotes for the shared scope decisions -- Gemini 3.5 Pro excluded as unreleased, Gemini 3.5 Flash Cyber excluded as gated/specialized). All four self-reported figures were confirmed on both the official launch blog and 9to5Google's reproduction of it. Direct fetch of artificialanalysis.ai/models/gemini-3-5-flash-lite confirmed AA shows only its composite Intelligence Index (36), no per-benchmark numerals, so no independent counterweight is available yet. Omitted NO-SLUG figure: GDM-MRCR v2 long-context 72.2%. 4 self-reported benchmarks across 2 categories (coding, agents) -> meets the D20 ranking gate. Predecessor resolves within the 'Gemini 3.5' family to gemini-3-5-flash (the mechanical nearest-older sibling), consistent with how gemini-3-1-flash-lite succeeds gemini-3-1-pro in this corpus.
